name: io.github.jussmor/commit-memory
description: Local commit-aware RAG MCP server for semantic git history search using SQLite vectors.

environmentVariables.name: COMMIT_RAG_REPO
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the target git repository.

environmentVariables.name: COMMIT_RAG_DB
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file.

environmentVariables.name: COMMIT_RAG_LIMIT
environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of commits to index per run.

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Ollama base URL for embedding requests.

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding model name to use with Ollama.
